title: express Is Trending: Here's What Backend Developers Need to Know
description: express is trending on GitHub with 109234.9k new stars this week. Fast, unopinionated, minimalist web framework.
bodyHtml:
express is making waves in the Backend ecosystem this week, gaining 109.2M weekly downloads. over 69.2k stars on GitHub and 23.9k forks, this open-source project is rapidly becoming a go-to tool for developers worldwide.

⭐ 69.2kStars
📈 +109234.9k/wkGrowth
🔀 23.9kForks
⚠️ 216Open Issues

Key Features

  • Written in JavaScript/TypeScript for maximum performance
  • Licensed under MIT — free to use and modify
  • Official website: https://expressjs.com/
  • 🏷️ express
  • 🏷️ framework
  • 🏷️ sinatra
  • 🏷️ web
  • 🏷️ http

Why express Is Trending

The Backend landscape is constantly evolving, and express has emerged as one of the fastest-growing projects this week. Several factors contribute to its momentum:

  1. Growing community: With 109234.9k new stars this week alone, developer adoption is accelerating rapidly.
  2. Active maintenance: The project sees regular updates, ensuring compatibility with the latest ecosystem changes.
  3. Practical utility: Fast, unopinionated, minimalist web framework

If you're working in Backend, this is definitely a project worth watching — and adopting.

Quick Start

Get started with express in minutes:

# Clone the repository git clone https://www.npmjs.com/package/express # Navigate to project cd express # Check the README for detailed setup instructions

For full documentation and advanced usage, visit the official GitHub repository.

Final Thoughts

express is a solid addition to any developer's toolkit. With its growing community, active development, and practical design, it's well worth your time to evaluate. Star it on GitHub, try it in a side project, and see if it fits your workflow.
